text.title: Policy as Code: OPA, Kyverno, and Admission Control Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: define-baseline
step.action: Pick PSS baseline or restricted. List explicit rules: no-privileged, no-root, resource-limits, trusted-registries, verifyImages.

step.name: write-policies
step.action: Author Kyverno ClusterPolicy YAML (or OPA Rego) — one rule per policy file when possible.

step.name: write-unit-tests
step.action: Write kyverno test (or conftest verify) covering PASS + FAIL per rule.

step.name: deploy-via-gitops-in-audit
step.action: Create ArgoCD app / Flux Kustomization. validationFailureAction: Audit.
step.output: Policy live in cluster, no enforcement yet

step.name: review-audit-violations
step.action: Triage every violation: fix the resource, exempt with rationale, or update the policy.
step.decision-gate: BLOCK promotion to Enforce until audit-clean.

step.name: promote-to-enforce
step.action: Flip validationFailureAction: Enforce. Stage per-namespace if cluster is large.
